# Reporting Damage

At Acme Shop, customers can report damaged items within 14 days of receipt for a potential replacement or refund. The process involves logging into their account, navigating to "Order History," and submitting a damage report with detailed descriptions and photos. Claims are reviewed within 48 hours, and approved claims may result in an email with next steps, which could include free item returns. Items damaged due to misuse after delivery are not eligible for claims, and exceptions to the 14-day policy may be considered under certain extenuating circumstances by customer service.

[Source: damaged_items.md#reporting-damage]
